sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SOPHIE (-25 Mar 1344, bur Stuttgart Stiftskirche).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SOPHIE de Ferrette, daughter of THIEBAUD [I] Comte de Ferrette [Pfirt] & his wife Katharina von Klingen (-25 Mar 1344, bur Stuttgart Stiftskirche).

parent.name: Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette

zh.lifeSummary: 當Condensa Sophie von Pfirt於大約1292年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒朋吉亞-姆素時，她的母親Katharina von Klingen39歲，父親Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette37歲。她和Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III至少有2個兒子。她去世於1344年3月25日在德國享年53歲，埋葬在德國爾特波格斯圖特加特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Condensa Sophie von Pfirt于大约1292年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒朋吉亞-姆素时，她的母亲Katharina von Klingen39岁，父亲Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette37岁。她和Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III至少有2个儿子。她去世于1344年3月25日在德国享年53岁，埋葬在德国爾特波格斯圖特加特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Pfirt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peart
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Perth (Perths), which is recorded as Pertc. 1128. The placename derives from Pictish perta ‘(at the) thicket, copse’.
English: nickname, probably from a shortened form of Middle English, Old French apert ‘open, plain to see’, of persons ‘frank, honest’ or ‘accomplished’.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Condensa Sophie von Pfirt was born about 1292, in Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her mother, Katharina von Klingen, was 39 and her father, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, was 37. She had at least 2 sons with Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III. She died on 25 March 1344, in Germany, at the age of 53, and was buried in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Condensa Sophie von Pfirt est née environ 1292, à Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, sa mère, Katharina von Klingen, avait 39 ans et son père, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III. Elle est décédée le 25 mars 1344, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Condensa Sophie von Pfirt um 1292 in Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Katharina von Klingen 39 und ihr Vater Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette 37. Sie hatte mit Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 25. März 1344 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Deutschland und wurde in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Condensa Sophie von Pfirt è nata il circa 1292 nel Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua madre, Katharina von Klingen, aveva 39 anni e sua padre, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III. Morì il 25 marzo 1344, nel Germania, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania.

ja.Stuttgart, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germa: ドイツウuルッテンバーグストゥットガート
ja.Stuttgart, Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany: ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガート
ja.Stuttgart, Stuttgart, Neckarkreis, Württ: ドイツウuルッテンバーグストゥットガート
ja.lifeSummary: Condensa Sophie von Pfirtが約1292年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルポント-a-モウソンで生まれた時，母Katharina von Klingenは39歳，父Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferretteは37歳であった。彼女はConde Ulrich von Württemberg IIIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1344年3月25日にドイツで53歳で死去し，ドイツウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Condensa Sophie von Pfirt(이)가 대략 1292년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 폰트-a-모우슨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Katharina von Klingen(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 아버지 Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 3월 25일 독일에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 wu르테버그 스투트가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Condensa Sophie von Pfirt nasceu aproximadamente 1292, em Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, sua mãe, Katharina von Klingen, tinha 39 anos e seu pai, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III. Ela faleceu em 25 de março de 1344, em Alemanha, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Condensa Sophie von Pfirt родилась около 1292 г. в местности понт-a-муссон, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её матери по имени Katharina von Klingen было 39 лет, а отцу, которого звали Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, 37. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III. Она умерла 25 марта 1344 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Condensa Sophie von Pfirt nació aproximadamente 1292, en Pont-à-Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su mamá, Katharina von Klingen, tenía 39 años y su papá, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Conde Ulrich von Württemberg III. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1344, en Alemania, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania.
